top_blockers.title: Delayed Service Due to Provider's Discretion in Sharing Audit Rights
top_blockers.recommendation: Clarify and enforce specific audit rights with the provider.

top_blockers.title: Unclear Data Deletion Timeline After Termination
top_blockers.recommendation: Ensure clear and enforceable data deletion policies are established.

top_blockers.title: Potential Misuse of Service Data for Product Development and Model Improvement
top_blockers.recommendation: Clarify the terms under which the provider can use customer data.

business_impact.label: Impact 1
business_impact.detail: Operational delays could impact business operations.

business_impact.label: Impact 2
business_impact.detail: Data security risks may lead to compliance issues and potential legal liabilities.

business_impact.label: Impact 3
business_impact.detail: Misuse of customer data could harm the company's reputation.

findings.title: Delayed Service Due to Provider's Discretion in Sharing Audit Rights
findings.description: The agreement does not specify customer audit rights, leaving the provider discretion on sharing necessary audit information.
findings.recommendation: Clarify and enforce specific audit rights with the provider.
findings.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

findings.title: Unclear Data Deletion Timeline After Termination
findings.description: The agreement lacks specific timelines for data deletion, posing a risk of data lingering post-termination.
findings.recommendation: Ensure clear and enforceable data deletion policies are established.
findings.snippet: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated.

findings.title: Potential Misuse of Service Data for Product Development and Model Improvement
findings.description: The provider may use de-identified service data without explicit consent, posing a risk of proprietary information misuse.
findings.recommendation: Clarify the terms under which the provider can use customer data.
findings.snippet: Provider may use de-identified service data for product development and model improvement.

evidence_trail.title: Delayed Service Due to Provider's Discretion in Sharing Audit Rights
evidence_trail.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

evidence_trail.title: Unclear Data Deletion Timeline After Termination
evidence_trail.snippet: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated.

evidence_trail.title: Potential Misuse of Service Data for Product Development and Model Improvement
evidence_trail.snippet: Provider may use de-identified service data for product development and model improvement.
